title: microlepia nudisora
intro: Microlepia nudisora, also known as the Nudisora or Asiatic Tuckahoe, is a type of fern used in traditional medicine, primarily in Asia. The plant is said to have medicinal properties due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing fever, and alleviating rheumatic pain. The health benefits of Microlepia nudisora include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
